responses.text: [Step closer to the terminal and touch the keyboard]

dynamic_line:
&<color_light_green> @User > update

 .  .  .  .  .  .  %100

 Update to ELECTRIC POWER available from AltarOS remote.  Route a path to cache?  Y/N

&<color_light_green> @User > update -help
</color> update: update
   Search for and prepare updates for the ʰᵒᵐᵉ.
   If a useful update is available, AltarOS can make a route to the cache, making it possible for ᴴᵁᴹᴬᴺ to access the update package.
   Fully recovering the package is required to update.
   Your system obelisk will provide instructions on site.
